title: Squirrel Removal in Brooklyn Heights | $900 - $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Brooklyn Heights, Brooklyn. Expert wildlife control for historic brownstones and residential properties. Licensed & insured. Call today!
intro: Brooklyn Heights residents face unique squirrel challenges due to the neighborhood's abundance of mature trees and historic architecture. Our professional squirrel removal services protect your brownstone, co-op, or townhouse from structural damage and noise disruptions caused by these persistent rodents. We provide humane, effective removal with comprehensive exclusion work tailored to Brooklyn Heights' distinctive building styles.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in squirrel removal for Brooklyn Heights' century-old buildings, understanding the delicate balance between preserving architectural integrity and implementing modern wildlife exclusion techniques. Our licensed technicians have over 15 years of experience serving Brooklyn Heights homeowners with same-day emergency response and guaranteed results.
localContext: Brooklyn Heights' tree-lined streets and proximity to Brooklyn Bridge Park create an ideal habitat for gray squirrels seeking entry into attics and crawl spaces of historic homes along the Promenade and Willow Street. The neighborhood's landmark brownstones with their ornate cornices and aged rooflines require specialized sealing techniques that respect the architectural character while effectively excluding wildlife.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Brooklyn Heights?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Brooklyn Heights typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and the complexity of exclusion work required for historic buildings. Our technicians provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are squirrels damaging my Brooklyn Heights brownstone?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage to Brooklyn Heights homes by chewing through wooden trim, damaging insulation, gnawing on electrical wiring, and creating entry holes in soffits and rooflines. They also leave droppings and urine that can compromise air quality and attract other pests.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Brooklyn Heights home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Brooklyn Heights and can typically complete initial trapping within 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels present. Complete exclusion work to seal entry points and prevent re-entry usually takes 1-2 additional visits to ensure your home is fully protected.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in Brooklyn Heights?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We follow all NYC wildlife control regulations and use humane live trapping methods whenever possible. Our approach prioritizes the safe removal and relocation of squirrels while ensuring they cannot return to your property through proper exclusion techniques that comply with Brooklyn's landmark preservation guidelines.
